_meta.description: FROZEN config for the Leka Wood-Products internal order portal. Single source of truth for order number format, Slack channel, Xero fallback, auth rules, and pricing formula. Do not duplicate these values in code — read from this file.

pricing._fx_note: Frankfurter.app publishes ECB mid-market rates — free, no API key, JSON. The 3% buffer approximates the spread between ECB mid and what a Thai bank would charge on a TT Selling transaction (covers bank margin + swift/wire fees). Final FX = api_rate * (1 + fx_buffer_pct/100). Falls back to fx_thb_per_usd_fallback when the API is unreachable.
pricing._landed_note: Covers ocean freight FCL-40, import duty, VAT on import, local handling. landed_cost_thb_per_m = sku_map.line_m_price_usd * fx * landed_multiplier.
pricing._markup_note: default_unit_price_thb = landed_cost_thb_per_m * default_markup. Sales adjusts via per-line GM slider.

legacy_public_routes._note: These routes must remain untouched by the order portal.
